arts.ttl: Preview: Dundee vs. Celtic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Scottish Premiership clash between Dundee and Celtic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: The hidden sign Kyogo is loving Celtic more than EVER as Callum McGregor runs out of words to describe him
arts.sum: McGregor doesn't know if Kyogo is celebrating more now but he does know he's working just as hard as ever

arts.ttl: Dundee return to Mexico for ANOTHER transfer thriller as Victor 'Chespi' Lopez set bring his tricks
arts.sum: The winger is currently on-loan at fellow Mexican side Queretaro but could now be recalled

arts.ttl: James McFadden states what he noticed about Kyogo in his new role for Celtic at Ross County
arts.sum: James McFadden impressed by Kyogo Furuhashi after Celtic beat Ross County Celtic put four goals past Ross County and, at the time, went 18 points clear at the top of the Premiership table.
